headline: Intel (INTC) Stock Could Be 10% Undervalued After BofA Double Upgrade
summary: Intel (INTC) stock is back in focus after a rare double upgrade from Bank of America, which highlights a shift in AI infrastructure demand toward CPUs and renewed interest in Intel’s foundry ambitions. See our latest analysis for Intel. Despite a sharp 1-day share price decline of 8.45% to US$117.05, Intel stock is still riding powerful momentum, with a 90-day share price return of 153.46% and a very large 1-year total shareholder return of 444.67%. This reflects how investors are reacting to...
